stemHtml: Refer to ED-4 VFR chart from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. A pilot is planning a VFR flight from an Austrian aerodrome onto the southern German aerodrome Straubing (EDMS) (48°54'05'' N, 012°31'03'' E). The final flight leg of the VFR route begins from the lighted obstacle located North off the Linz city (48°23'05'' N, 014°15'18'' E) which has an elevation of 3 038 ft and ends at the destination aerodrome. What is the average true track for final flight leg?
